title: The California Air Resources Board (CARB) Withdraws Its Request to EPA for a Waiver For Its Advanced Clean Fleets (ACF) Regulation Among Others
content: The California Air Resources Board (CARB) has withdrawn its request for a waiver and authorization, pursuant to Clean Air Act (CAA) section 209(b) and (e), respectively, for its Advanced Clean Fleets (ACF) regulation, submitted to the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) on November 15, 2023. CARB has also withdrawn its waiver requests for In-Use Locomotive Standards, Transport Refrigeration Unit Engine Standards and parts of the Commercial Harbor Craft regulation.
author: Analysts Account
